what_worked: Completed cycle 7
Marathon supervisor pattern: Don't use exec to launch ralph — run it in background with a polling supervisor that enforces duration/budget/checkpoints. Pattern proven in ralphglasses/marathon.sh.
what_failed: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY breaks Claude Code: Claude Code uses OAuth, setting ANTHROPIC_API_KEY overrides with invalid key. Must unset before launching ralph.
CLAUDECODE env var: Must unset to avoid nested session detection when launching from within Claude Code.
sed -i portability: sed -i '' is macOS-only. On Linux use sed -i without empty string arg. Better: use a helper function that greps-then-seds or adds-if-missing.
ralph-enable --force: Overwrites .ralphrc and .gitignore. Always backup/restore custom settings.
((x++)) with set -e: When x=0, arithmetic returns exit code 1, killing the script. Use $((x + 1)).
suggestions: Marathon supervisor pattern: Don't use exec to launch ralph — run it in background with a polling supervisor that enforces duration/budget/checkpoints.
Always unset ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and CLAUDECODE before launching ralph from Claude Code sessions.
Use a portable sed helper or grep-then-sed pattern instead of sed -i with platform-specific args.
Always backup .ralphrc before running ralph-enable --force.
Avoid ((x++)) with set -e — use x=$((x + 1)) instead to prevent exit code 1 when x=0.
